question: Show names for all cities where at least three students live.
sql: SELECT City.city_name FROM Student JOIN City ON Student.city_code = City.city_code GROUP BY City.city_code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;

back_translation.intent: 找出至少有三个学生的城市名称

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求显示所有城市名称，其中至少有三个学生居住，但反向翻译的描述中未明确连接Student和City表，且group_by字段为Student.city_code，无法直接得出城市名称。
